mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, nickname, real_name, avatar, email, phone, gender, birthday, status, locked, lock_time, lock_reason, last_login_time, last_login_ip, password_update_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM system_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, username, password, nickname, real_name, avatar, email, phone, gender, birthday, status, locked, lock_time, lock_reason, last_login_time, last_login_ip, password_update_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM system_user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, username, password, nickname, real_name, avatar, email, phone, gender, birthday, status, locked, lock_time, lock_reason, last_login_time, last_login_ip, password_update_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM system_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0
